elements.description: ห้องน้ำ 1, floor level box '3 +0.20 5' matching the plan view
twin awning/louvre windows (triangle callout '3') at high level on the far wall
circled '5' marker above the windows, ceiling/vent reference
triangle callout '1' at upper-left of the section, likely the entry door swing shown in elevation
triangle callouts '2' at two positions along the section (left wall and mid-height)
granite counter with mirror (M.) and LAV.1 basin, right side of section, counter height ~0.80m with 0.20m upstand shown (0.20/0.80/1.45/2.38/0.93/0.45 vertical dim chain)
WC.1 toilet shown in elevation, center of section, with PH./HS. fittings beside it

warnings: Second of 2 views on this page; sibling is the plan view _view1_wc1_plan.json.

The vertical dimension chain on the right side of the section (0.20/0.80/1.45/2.38/0.93/0.45) has overlapping/nested annotations that are hard to fully disambiguate at this resolution -- recorded as a set rather than assigning each value confidently to a specific counter/mirror/ceiling feature.

This is the final view on the WC.1-dedicated sheet (A-16 of 27 total architecture sheets); confirms this house uses one dedicated expansion sheet per bathroom (A-16=WC.1, A-17=WC.2, A-18=WC.3) rather than house #3's shared single sheet for WC.1+WC.2.
